cells.source:
import datetime
now = datetime.datetime.now()
print("Current date and time : ")
print(now.strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"))

num1 = int(input("enter first answer:"))
num2 = int(input(" enter secound value:"))
sum_of_numbers = num1 + num2
print(f"The sum of {num1} and {num2} is: {sum_of_numbers}")

enter first answer: 00
 enter secound value: 88

cells.source:
from math import pi
r = int(input("Input the radius of the circle : "))
area = pi * r**2
print(f"The area of the circle with radius {r} is: {area}")

outputs.name: stdin
outputs.text: Input the radius of the circle :  99

outputs.name: stdout
outputs.text: The area of the circle with radius 99 is: 30790.74959783356
